content:
Originally published on the MyTreda engineering blog: read here

A support message described what looked like one confusing mobile bug. It turned out to be two independent ones — a cross-site cookie getting blocked by Safari's ITP, and a React Hook Form autofill desync — that just happened to both only show up on mobile. Full breakdown, code, and fixes below.
